# Thumos

> Thumos is a dating app that uses AI conversations to build a living portrait of who you are, then matches you with deeply compatible people. No swiping. No photos. Just understanding.

Thumos replaces swiping with reflective AI conversations called Soul Mirror. Through natural conversation, it builds a deep psychological portrait covering attachment style, love language, conflict approach, values, and partnership vision. The matching engine then evaluates compatibility across romance dimensions to find genuinely compatible people.

Unlike Tinder, Hinge, or Bumble, Thumos never shows your profile or photos to other users. Matches only see a display name and an AI-generated explanation of why you connect. Available free on iOS.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://trythumos.com/): Landing page and app download
- [About Thumos](https://trythumos.com/about): What Thumos is, how it works, who it's for
- [Compare Dating Apps](https://trythumos.com/compare): Thumos vs Tinder vs Hinge vs Bumble vs eHarmony vs OkCupid
- [Support & FAQ](https://trythumos.com/support): How Thumos works, privacy, data deletion, matching FAQ
- [Privacy Policy](https://trythumos.com/privacy): Data handling, third-party disclosures

## Blog
- [Why We Built Thumos](https://trythumos.com/blog/why-we-built-thumos): The problem with swiping and what comes next
- [AI Conversations vs Questionnaires](https://trythumos.com/blog/ai-conversations-vs-questionnaires): Why conversations reveal more than multiple-choice questions
- [What Is a Soul Portrait?](https://trythumos.com/blog/what-is-a-soul-portrait): A living psychological portrait, not a curated dating profile

## Key Features
- [Soul Mirror](https://trythumos.com/about#soul-mirror-ai-powered-self-discovery): AI-powered reflective conversations that build a living portrait
- [Soulmate Matching](https://trythumos.com/about#matching-compatibility-across-romance-dimensions): LLM-based compatibility evaluation across romance dimensions
- [Privacy-First Design](https://trythumos.com/privacy): Your portrait is never shared with other users

## App
- [Download on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/thumos-the-soul-mirror/id6761300301)
